mapper.sql: id, name, address, thumbnail_url, region_code, rating_avg, rating_count
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, address, lat, lng, description, phone, website, thumbnail_url, region_code, rating_avg, rating_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM gyms WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, name, address, thumbnail_url, region_code, rating_avg, rating_count, lat, lng FROM ( SELECT , lat, lng, 6371 * acos(LEAST(1.0, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(lat)) * cos(radians(lng) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(lat)) )) AS distance_km FROM gyms WHERE lat IS NOT NULL AND lng IS NOT NULL AND status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL ) t WHERE t.distance_km <= #{radiusKm} ORDER BY t.distance_km, t.id LIMIT #{size}
SELECT id, gym_id, uploaded_by, gcs_path, caption, display_order, created_at FROM gym_photos WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY display_order, id
